gaps.description: Voice adapters (sensevoice.js, whisper.js, piper.js, openai-tts.js, openai-whisper.js, elevenlabs.js, macos-say.js, kokoro.js) listed in directory structure with one-line descriptions but lack formal API sections with function signatures in ARCHITECTURE.md

All core modules (detector/, engine/, runtime/, server/, cli/, store/, tunnel.js, config.js, index.js, ui/) are implemented matching ARCHITECTURE.md — M101 engine registry unification complete: brain.js/stt.js/tts.js route through registry.resolveModel, /api/ollama/* removed, dead files deleted
